title: Android 生态负责人 Sameer Samat 谈 AI 集成与平台演进
full_text:
Jun 4th, 2026
Android's Samat on Integrating AI into the Ecosystem
Sameer Samat, President of Android Ecosystem at Google discusses platform evolution, AI integration and ecosystem strategy with Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman in a live version of Power On at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco.
